summary: Resolved the admin UI npm ERESOLVE failure by replacing deprecated @sentry/angular-ivy with @sentry/angular, whose peer dependency range supports the Angular 18 admin app.

acceptance_results.criterion: npm install in frontend/webspa-admin resolves without --force or --legacy-peer-deps.
acceptance_results.reason: Install completed after seeding the Sentry tarball cache; the previous @sentry/angular-ivy Angular <=17 peer conflict is gone. The remaining warning is the local Node 24 engine mismatch against the project-declared Node 18/20 range.

acceptance_results.criterion: Admin build compiles with the replacement Sentry package.
acceptance_results.reason: Angular build completed successfully with @sentry/angular imports and createErrorHandler provider usage.

acceptance_results.criterion: Deprecated @sentry/angular-ivy is removed from source and lockfile.

cleanup_notes: A temporary download file was used only to seed npm cache for @sentry/angular@10.52.0 because npm fetches timed out while curl could retrieve the tarball.
No service was restarted from this worktree.
completed_work: Created TMP-064 classified defect issue and work order.
Identified root cause: @sentry/angular-ivy@7.120.4 peers @angular/common/core/router only through <=17.x while webspa-admin uses Angular 18.2.x.
Replaced the admin dependency with @sentry/angular@10.52.0, whose peer range is >=14.x <=21.x.
Updated Sentry imports in the standalone bootstrap and legacy NgModule file.
Regenerated package-lock.json without legacy peer dependency flags.
known_gaps: The local shell is running Node v24.15.0, while webspa-admin declares supported Node engines ^18.19.0 || ^20.9.0; npm reports EBADENGINE as a warning.
The build still reports pre-existing stylesheet budget and selector warnings unrelated to this dependency fix.
operator_message: TMP-064 is complete: the admin UI no longer depends on @sentry/angular-ivy and npm install resolves without peer-dependency bypass flags.
risk_notes: No backend service, database migration, auth flow, admin API route, or CORS code changed.
Sentry initialization remains in main.ts; the legacy app.module.ts now uses the same createErrorHandler provider shape rather than the removed SentryModule/SentryErrorHandler exports.

validation.output_excerpt: up to date in 3m; no ERESOLVE
added 1016 packages in 4s; no ERESOLVE; EBADENGINE warning for local Node 24
TMP-064 assignment_decision allow; no blocking reasons
ok true; only existing historical/schedulable warnings
